judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes all required eye-exposure actions in the correct sequence: rinse 15-20 minutes, remove contacts after 5 minutes if present and continue rinsing, then call poison control or a doctor. It also preserves the do-not-stop-rinsing warning and escalation once rinsing begins. Wording is clear and usable.
